ddls:
CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the project to which the release belongs */,
  "release_order" TEXT /* Order of the release within the project */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was made */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the release */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the software project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the requirement is associated with */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the requirement */,
  "external_reference" TEXT /* External reference link or ID */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the requirement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the requirement */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the developer or team assigned to the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requirements_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixes" (
  "fix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixed issue */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release where the issue was fixed */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "fix_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was fixed */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fix */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixes_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the author contributed to */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Nature of the contribution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the author belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the metrics are associated with */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code added */,
  "lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code removed */,
  "churn" INTEGER /* Code churn metric */,
  "change_set_size" INTEGER /* Size of the change set */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the code */,
  "faultiness" INTEGER /* Indication of faultiness */,
  "lines_max" INTEGER /* Maximum number of lines added or removed in a single commit */,
  "lines_avg" REAL /* Average number of lines added or removed per commit */,
  "churn_max" INTEGER /* Maximum code churn in a single commit */,
  "churn_avg" REAL /* Average code churn per commit */,
  "churn_weighted" REAL /* Weighted code churn metric */,
  "age_weighted" REAL /* Weighted age of the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location entry */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the location is associated with */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of code location (e.g., A for Application, M for Middleware, D for Database) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the code location */,
  "line_numbers" TEXT /* Line numbers affected in the code location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_locations_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release the violation is associated with */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of coding standard violation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the violation occurred */,
  "line_numbers" TEXT /* Line numbers where the violation occurred */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the release being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission association */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role-permission association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
